description:
# Seared Scallop Dish

This elegantly plated fine dining dish features perfectly seared scallops with a golden crust, served atop a vibrant green pea purée and accompanied by a delicate cream sauce. The presentation is refined and sophisticated, garnished with fresh rosemary sprigs, chive greens, and edible purple flowers on a soft blue-green plate, evoking an upscale restaurant atmosphere.
